description: Style NoteA love-forever classic, this murcia sling bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples.Product DetailsBlue handbag, leather detailing on the front, one large zipped compartment, two inner pouches and one internal zipper, metallic zip pulls, blue adjustable strapMaterial and CareNubuck, leatherWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 21 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 3 cm
